answer: The primary purpose of the Python Standard Library is to provide a wide range of facilities and standardized solutions for many problems that occur in everyday programming, including access to system functionality and platform-neutral APIs.
built-in modules (written in C) that provide access to system functionality, and modules written in Python that provide standardized solutions for many problems that occur in everyday programming
as a collection of packages, so it may be necessary to use the packaging tools provided with the operating system to obtain some or all of the optional components
int, float, complex, bool, list, tuple, range, str, bytes, bytearray, memoryview, set, frozenset, dict, Generic Alias, Union
